languages.text: "Приказываю меровцам отступить к укрепленным поселениям и держать оборону, а потом контратаковать при первой возможности".
"I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."
languages.original_text: "Приказываю меровцам отступить к укрепленным поселениям и держать оборону, а потом контратаковать при первой возможности".

traits.locale_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."
"I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."
"I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

languages.text: 「メロヴィング朝軍は、要塞化した集落に退却し、陣地を固め、最初の機会に反撃せよ」
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィング朝軍は、要塞化した集落に退却し、陣地を固め、最初の機会に反撃せよ」

languages.text: «Ordeno a los merovianos que se retiren a los asentamientos fortificados y resistan ahí, contraatacando en cuanto se presente la ocasión».
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: «Ordeno a los merovianos que se retiren a los asentamientos fortificados y resistan ahí, contraatacando en cuanto se presente la ocasión».

languages.text: “命令梅罗夫人撤退至要塞定居点固守，伺机反击。”
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: “命令梅罗夫人撤退至要塞定居点固守，伺机反击。”

languages.text: "Die Merovianer sollen an den befestigten Siedlungen die Stellung halten und bei erster Gelegenheit zurückschlagen."
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Die Merovianer sollen an den befestigten Siedlungen die Stellung halten und bei erster Gelegenheit zurückschlagen."

languages.text: "Merovluların müstahkem yerleşimlere geri çekilip hattı tutmalarını, ardından ilk fırsatta karşı saldırıya geçmelerini emrediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Merovluların müstahkem yerleşimlere geri çekilip hattı tutmalarını, ardından ilk fırsatta karşı saldırıya geçmelerini emrediyorum."

languages.text: « J'ordonne aux Meroviens de se retirer dans leurs fortifications et de tenir leurs positions, puis de contre-attaquer dès que l'occasion se présentera. »
languages.original_text: "I order the Merovians to retreat to the fortified settlements and hold the line, then counter-attack at the first opportunity."

traits.locale_text: « J'ordonne aux Meroviens de se retirer dans leurs fortifications et de tenir leurs positions, puis de contre-attaquer dès que l'occasion se présentera. »
